title: Task outcome: RAG verification subagent 10 cross-review and purity filter: review synthesized findings from su
summary: Completed read-only RAG purity cross-review. Filtered synthesized subagent findings into durable core RAG claims, optional retrieval/agent-memory methods, provider/paper-specific holds, and reclassification caveats for DinoBrain accepted-memory intake.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Completed read-only RAG purity cross-review. Filtered synthesized subagent findings into durable core RAG claims, optional retrieval/agent-memory methods, provider/paper-specific holds, and reclassification caveats for DinoBrain accepted-memory intake.
request: RAG verification subagent 10 cross-review and purity filter: review synthesized findings from subagents 01-06 without editing files; filter into ACCEPT/HOLD/REJECT and return concise Korean durable-knowledge report.
decisions: Accept high-purity RAG architecture, retrieval quality, hybrid retrieval, reranking placement, indexing/query-time separation, and provenance/evaluation guidance as durable DinoBrain knowledge.
Reclassify HyDE, RAPTOR, contextual retrieval, Reflexion, and Graph RAG as optional adjacent methods or overlays rather than core RAG.
Hold Lewis RAG details and managed cloud KB feature claims as paper/provider-specific unless source-bound records are created.
Reject any memory framing that implies RAG guarantees truth or that optional methods are core RAG components.
next_steps: Create accepted memory records only for durable architecture/taxonomy/design-policy categories, keeping provider and paper facts in source-bound or evaluation-gated records.

evidence.snippet: Completed read-only RAG purity cross-review. Filtered synthesized subagent findings into durable core RAG claims, optional retrieval/agent-memory methods, provider/paper-specific holds, and reclassification caveats for DinoBrain accepted-memory intake.
